## What & Why

<!-- One or two lines. Link the issue, milestone, or plan if one exists. -->

## Type

- [ ] `feat` - new feature
- [ ] `fix` - bug fix
- [ ] `docs` / `chore`
- [ ] `hotfix` - production emergency

## Definition Of Done

- [ ] Typecheck command run, or marked `N/A` with reason
- [ ] Lint command run, or marked `N/A` with reason
- [ ] Relevant tests run, or marked `N/A` with reason
- [ ] Build command run, or marked `N/A` with reason
- [ ] QA completed for touched flows and recorded in `docs/qa/`
- [ ] Docs updated: `CHANGELOG.md`, `docs/ARCHITECTURE.md`, `docs/qa/KNOWN-ISSUES.md`, or `docs/futurework/ROADMAP.md` as applicable
- [ ] No secrets, credentials, or private data committed

## QA Notes

For AI agents: open this PR and stop for human review unless explicitly told to
